calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating settling C3 (test-design-fixed re-run of 700/700a)
items.note: Test-design-fixed re-run of the ARC-108 sec-7 learned-gating MECH-439 F-dominance falsifier; routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-700-cluster_2026-06-23 (700 SELECTION 2x2 + 700a C3 both FAILed on a BRITTLE HARNESS, not the claims). Harness fixes: (1) verified-lifting noise bar NOISE_FLOOR_ALPHA 1.0->2.0 kept as a precondition; (2) per-seed-divergent gating (interpret C1/C2/C3 only on divergent seeds, 701a-style, so a degenerate monostrategy cell self-excludes); (3) 6 seeds; (4) focus the settling arm (A2/A3, drop the below-noise w_chan-only A1); (5) fold C3 signed-vs-unsigned-RPE (learned_channel_rpe_mode) in as arms. Positive 700 signal: clean divergent seed 42 -> learned settling (MECH-450 W_lat) lifted committed-class entropy +0.25 over A0 and beat noise; settling is the lever. Matched constant on ALL arms (do NOT toggle): landed arithmetic envelope use_f_eligibility_demotion + adaptive_floor (689e) + use_go_nogo_constitution (689g) + modulatory-authority/top_k k=3 (569i), use_differentiable_cem=False (SD-055 safety). Env reef-bipartite foraging size 12 hazard_food_attraction 0.7; phased P0(e2-train)/P1(bias REINFORCE)/P2(measure). Re-derive brake on MECH-439 (4 autopsies) + ARC-108 (2): EXEMPT per the autopsy (fired:false, user-adjudicated) + standard release path (ARC-108/MECH-450 substrate IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-20/22) -- do NOT re-trip. PRE-REGISTER decisive-or-escalate: STILL no conversion with a now-verified noise bar + per-seed gating -> route to V4 full BG-thalamo-cortical loop (no_lift_preconditions_met_escalate_v4_full_loop), NOT another V3 letter; preconditions-unmet self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. Governance: MECH-439 stays substrate_ceiling; ARC-108/MECH-450 stay substrate_conditional; pending_retest_after_substrate; PROMOTES NOTHING. Smoke 2026-06-23: 5/5 arms run end-to-end incl unsigned-RPE path; self-routes substrate_not_ready at toy scale (correct), no manifest leak.

items.title: SD-034/MECH-094 satisficing residue-discharge commitment-free retest (Leg-A hook wired; supersedes 466c)
items.note: Supersedes V3-EXQ-466c. ROOT-CAUSE FIX: 466c n_closures=0 on 3/3 seeds despite n_sequence_completions=11/6/5 because the Leg A env-completion hook (notify_env_completion) was absent in the harness -- the automatic rule_state-stability conjunction was the only closure trigger and was NOT met on the untrained/zeroed rule_bias_head + SP-CEM-perturbed agent (confirmed failure_autopsy_SD-034-closure-cluster-ext_2026-06-12). 466d wires use_closure_env_completion_hook=True + calls agent.notify_env_completion(action_class=action_idx) after each sequence_complete transition. Smoke 2026-06-24: n_closures=1 hook_calls=1 completions=1 on seed 42 at toy budget (Leg A fix demonstrable; contact guard fails at toy scale as expected, self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue correctly). Re-derive brake RELEASED: scaffolded_sd054_onboarding (GAP-11 done, 603n ready) + commitment-closure-control-plane Leg A (IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-12) both built. commitment_closure:GAP-4-battery node owner.

items.title: MECH-314 per-candidate novelty Goldilocks under 569i top-k shortlist (committed-class entropy DV; supersedes 590b)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-13 re-issue (supersedes V3-EXQ-590b FAIL/non_contributory 2026-06-11; the 590b routing table says 're-queue as V3-EXQ-590c'). RE-POSED both the swept knob AND the selection path per the F-dominance campaign. 590b swept modulatory_authority_gain because under the ADDITIVE authority the rescale washes out curiosity_novelty_weight (the 590a degenerate null). 590c instead sweeps curiosity_novelty_weight [0.0, 0.05, 0.25, 1.0] under the 569i TOP-K shortlist conversion path (use_modulatory_shortlist_then_modulate=True + modulatory_shortlist_mode=top_k + modulatory_shortlist_k=3), held CONSTANT with the rest of the GAP-A/modulatory-bias-selection-authority stack (use_modulatory_selection_authority=True, modulatory_authority_gain=1.0). Under top-k the committed action is the within-top-3 argmin of the curiosity-fed _modulatory_accum, so the pre-clamp novelty weight IS load-bearing (NOT washed out) -- a genuine Goldilocks (too-low=no range; too-high=clamp saturation). MECH-314 novelty is the SOLE modulatory channel (curiosity_candidate_source=e2_world_forward + SD-056 online + rollout clamp + SP-CEM + V_s; all other bias channels OFF). DV = committed-action-class entropy (the 569i/MECH-439 statistic), NOT h_pos. claim_ids re-evaluated from scratch = [MECH-314, DEV-NEED-003] (parent novelty channel reaching committed action + the developmental-need gate; NOT 590b's MECH-314a). MANDATORY non-vacuity guard (the 569i conversion is ENV-CONDITIONAL, V3-EXQ-625e): if committed-selection diversity does NOT survive MECH-439 F-dominance -- committed_class_entropy flat across weights (SAME statistic the Goldilocks routes on) OR curiosity bias range / e2 cand-divergence below floor -- the run self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory), NEVER a weakens. PASS (supports MECH-314 + DEV-NEED-003) = best non-zero weight lifts committed_class_entropy over the w=0 (F-only) control by >= 0.05 on >=2/3 seeds. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED (Step 2.5b): the 3 cited MECH-314 ceiling autopsies (EXQ-572-573, 604a-624a-630, gapA-cluster-604b-648a-649) were all on the ADDITIVE-authority / proposer-source / drowning path; 590c runs on the 569i TOP-K shortlist conversion path (modulatory-bias-selection-authority TOP-K amend IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-16, 569i PASS 2/3) over the ARC-065 GAP-A e2.world_forward channel (IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-07) -- the named upstream substrate IS now built, and this is the conversion-path re-issue (not a same-granularity lettered re-test). The mandatory non-vacuity guard self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a weakens) so a persisting ceiling cannot manufacture a false falsification. User-directed re-issue. Smoke 2026-06-24 (--dry-run): all 4 arms run end-to-end; guard correctly self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at toy/untrained-e2 scale; validate_experiments --strict OK; no manifest leak (emit_outcome dry_run relocation).
